name: Sunday Supper Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the Crisco in a large skillet over low heat.
2. Add onions and cook until tender, stirring occasionally.
3. Stir in flour and salt, then add milk. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until thickened and beginning to boil.
4. Remove from heat and stir in mustard and shredded cheese.
5. Cut hot dogs into 1/4 slices and arrange alternating layers of potatoes, hot dogs, and cheese sauce in a 2-quart greased casserole dish.
6. Top with additional cheese sauce.
7. Bake at 325°F for 1 hour and 15 minutes, or until heated through and bubbly.
8. Serve hot. Makes 6-8 servings.
